title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">✅</font> Maintains a logical reading pace →
content:
✅ Maintains a logical reading pace → Each week has two structured reading assignments, one from story structure, one from visual execution.

Next Steps
• Approve this finalized structure before moving to full integration.
• Would you like a visual roadmap (table, flowchart, or PDF) to accompany this?
• Any refinements before moving forward?
